name: Pulled Pork Tacos with Tomatillo Salsa (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
2. For each serving, lay about 4 ounces of pork over half of the tortilla, top with potato slices, 1/4 cup of cheese, and season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Fold over the tortilla and brush with olive oil. Grill for 3 minutes on each side, or until crispy and cheese has melted.
4. Serve with Tomatillo Salsa.
Tomatillo Salsa:
Combine the tomatillos, finely diced red onion, minced jalapeno, fresh lime juice, coarsely chopped cilantro, olive oil, and honey in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper. Refrigerate covered for up to 1 day. Bring to room temperature before serving. Yield: 1 1/2 cups.
